goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the 'north' and should have 'a star of 4'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'food type', and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the north and should have a star of 4
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should be in the same area as the hotel
Make sure you get phone number, food type, and address
